title: SQL: exec query with join condition results in "SQLException:SQLengine:Program contains errors"
poc: create table a (x int, y int);
select * from (select 1 as id , count(*) as cnt from (select distinct x,y from a) as b) as b2 join (select 1 as id , count(*) as cnt2 from a) as a2 on b2.id = a2.id;
select * from (select 1 as id , count(*) as cnt from (select distinct x,y from a) as b) as b2, (select 1 as id , count(*) as cnt2 from a) as a2 where b2.id = a2.id;
select * from (select 1 as id , count(*) as cnt from (select distinct x,y from a) as b) as b2, (select 1 as id , count(*) as cnt2 from a) as a2;
key_bug_features: exec query with join condition in SQL
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE b (a_id int, b_value varchar(50), c_date date);
CREATE TABLE c (d_id int PRIMARY KEY, e_value float CHECK (e_value >= 0));

SELECT * FROM (SELECT a_id, COUNT(*) AS total FROM b GROUP BY a_id) AS b_group JOIN (SELECT d_id, SUM(e_value) AS total_value FROM c WHERE e_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d_id) AS c_group ON b_group.a_id = c_group.d_id;
